Reviews Contact

About JCB Flooring

12+ years serving Atlanta and surrounding areas

JCB Flooring started with a simple mission: to provide Atlanta homeowners and businesses with exceptional flooring solutions built to last. Founded by a local craftsman with a passion for quality, we've grown from a small team to a trusted name in the community.

We believe in a hands-on approach, from initial consultation to final inspection. Our team uses only premium materials and proven techniques to ensure a flawless installation that stands the test of time. We're not satisfied until you are.

As an Atlanta-based company, we're committed to giving back to the community that supports us. We actively participate in local initiatives and prioritize eco-friendly practices to minimize our environmental impact.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
JCB Flooring

Trusted flooring contractor professionals serving Atlanta, GA and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
